rationale: Codebase-pin lens on the round-2 fix-up (7de2c459, verified via git archive into an absolute /tmp copy, live worktree never touched). All named symbols exist and match the BRIEF: reconcilePendingRefutations(beadID string, roots []string, applied []panel.Refutation) error (panel_advisory.go:605); the panelGateRoots/panelScanFn seam (complete.go:387-388 computes gateRoots once and passes it to both panelGate and reconcilePendingRefutations; panelScanFn = panel.Scan var seam at panel_advisory.go:32); panel.ForBead(panelScanFn(roots...), beadID) used consistently at panel_advisory.go:56,172,664; the three decode helpers decodePendingEntries/decodeRefutations/decodeDischargedEntries all return (entries, error) (panel_advisory.go:308,327,408). All 3 new tests present and PASS: TestPanelRefuted_CrossPanel_NoFalseDischarge, TestPanelRefuted_AlreadyCoveredPending_Completes (3 subtests), TestPanelRefuted_MalformedPendingEntries_Refuses (3 subtests). Full verification: go build ./... clean; gofmt -l ./cmd ./internal empty; go vet ./internal/panel ./internal/complete ./internal/bead clean; go test ./internal/complete -run 'PanelRefuted|PanelGate' all PASS (~29 top-level cases incl. all round-1 guards, WarnPathDoesNotDischarge signature update intact); go test ./internal/panel -run 'Refut|Round|Dup|PanelGateDecision' all PASS; go test ./internal/bead -run 'MergeMetadata|GetMetadata' all PASS; full sweep go test ./internal/panel ./internal/complete ./internal/bead ./cmd/mindspec all ok; go test -race on the three all ok, no data races. Scope confirmed exactly 3 files via git diff --stat ce9f5395 7de2c459, all under internal/complete/, one commit, no panel/bead/ADR/doc edits. z4ps TestRun_IdleNoBeads lives in internal/instruct (out of this sweep's scope) and is pre-existing/unrelated, confirmed not exercised. No missing symbols, no red tests.
